# Testing Architecture Overview

**Visual guide to the complete testing infrastructure**

---

## 🏗️ Testing Pyramid

```
                          ╔════════════╗
                          ║  E2E Tests ║  5%
                          ║  (Future)  ║
                          ╚════════════╝
                        ╔══════════════════╗
                        ║ Integration Tests║ 15%
                        ║  (Features)      ║
                        ╚══════════════════╝
                    ╔════════════════════════╗
                    ║  Component Tests       ║ 30%
                    ║  (UI & Interactions)   ║
                    ╚════════════════════════╝
            ╔══════════════════════════════════╗
            ║      Unit Tests                  ║ 50%
            ║  (Utilities & Business Logic)    ║
            ╚══════════════════════════════════╝
                  Jest + React Testing Library
```

---

## 📁 Complete File Structure

```
company-web/
│
├── 📄 jest.config.js                    ← Jest Configuration
├── 📄 jest.setup.js                     ← Global Test Setup
├── 📄 package.json                      ← Scripts (update needed)
│
├── 📁 .github/
│   ├── 📄 TESTING_STRATEGY.md                    (500+ lines)
│   ├── 📄 TESTING_IMPLEMENTATION.md              (400+ lines)
│   ├── 📄 TESTING_QUICK_REFERENCE.md             (300+ lines)
│   ├── 📄 TESTING_COMPANY_WEB_PATTERNS.md        (300+ lines)
│   ├── 📄 TESTING_COMPLETE_SUMMARY.md            (200+ lines)
│   ├── 📄 TESTING_DEPLOYMENT_READY.md            (250+ lines)
│   │
│   └── 📁 workflows/
│       └── 📄 test.yml                           ← CI/CD Pipeline
│
├── 📁 __tests__/
│   │
│   ├── 📁 setup/                                ← Test Infrastructure
│   │   ├── 📄 test-utils.tsx                   ✅ Custom render()
│   │   ├── 📄 mswServer.ts                     ✅ Mock API (6 endpoints)
│   │   └── 📄 fixtures.ts                      ✅ Test data
│   │
│   ├── 📁 unit/                                ← Unit Tests (50%)
│   │   ├── 📄 utilities.test.ts                ✅ Example
│   │   ├── 📄 validators.test.ts               (TODO)
│   │   ├── 📄 calculations.test.ts             (TODO)
│   │   └── 📄 formatters.test.ts               (TODO)
│   │
│   ├── 📁 components/                          ← Component Tests (30%)
│   │   ├── 📄 ContactForm.test.tsx             ✅ Example
│   │   ├── 📁 layout/
│   │   │   ├── 📄 Navbar.test.tsx              (TODO)
│   │   │   ├── 📄 Footer.test.tsx              (TODO)
│   │   │   └── 📄 MobileMenu.test.tsx          (TODO)
│   │   ├── 📁 sections/
│   │   │   ├── 📄 Hero.test.tsx                (TODO)
│   │   │   ├── 📄 Gallery.test.tsx             (TODO)
│   │   │   └── 📄 Services.test.tsx            (TODO)
│   │   └── 📁 ui/
│   │       ├── 📄 Button.test.tsx              (TODO)
│   │       └── 📄 Card.test.tsx                (TODO)
│   │
│   ├── 📁 hooks/                               ← Hook Tests (85%+ target)
│   │   ├── 📄 useContactForm.test.ts           ✅ Example
│   │   ├── 📄 useInvestmentForm.test.ts        (TODO)
│   │   └── 📄 useScrollAnimation.test.ts       (TODO)
│   │
│   └── 📁 integration/                         ← Integration Tests (15%)
│       ├── 📄 ContactFormFeature.test.tsx      ✅ Example
│       ├── 📄 InvestmentFlow.test.tsx          (TODO)
│       └── 📄 HomePageFlow.test.tsx            (TODO)
│
├── 📁 components/
│   ├── forms/
│   ├── layout/
│   ├── sections/
│   └── ui/
│
├── 📁 hooks/
├── 📁 lib/
├── 📁 app/
│
└── 📁 coverage/                              ← Generated by npm run test:coverage
    ├── 📄 lcov.info
    ├── 📁 lcov-report/
    │   └── 📄 index.html
    └── 📄 coverage-summary.json
```

---

## 🔄 Testing Data Flow

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Test Execution Flow                      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    npm test
        ↓
    jest.config.js (Configuration)
        ↓
    jest.setup.js (Environment Setup)
        │
        ├─→ Mock IntersectionObserver
        ├─→ Mock window.matchMedia
        ├─→ Mock next/router
        ├─→ Mock next/navigation
        └─→ Setup MSW Server
        ↓
    Test File Execution
        ↓
    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Test Utilities (test-utils.tsx)     │
    │ ├─ customRender()                  │
    │ ├─ Providers wrapper               │
    │ └─ RTL exports                     │
    └─────────────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Test Data (fixtures.ts)             │
    │ ├─ mockServices                    │
    │ ├─ mockFormData                    │
    │ └─ mockUser                        │
    └─────────────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Mock APIs (mswServer.ts)            │
    │ ├─ GET /api/services               │
    │ ├─ POST /api/contact               │
    │ ├─ POST /api/investment            │
    │ ├─ GET /api/not-found              │
    │ └─ GET /api/error                  │
    └─────────────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
    Component/Hook/Function Testing
        ↓
    Results + Coverage Report
```

---

## 🎯 Testing By Category

### **1. Unit Tests (50% of suite)**

```
Pure Functions → No React Dependencies → Test Isolation

Examples:
  validateEmail('test@example.com')  →  true/false
  calculateReturn(100000, 0.08, 5)   →  146933
  formatDate(new Date())             →  "May 21, 2026"

Files:
  lib/validators.ts          → test validation logic
  lib/calculations.ts        → test math functions
  lib/formatters.ts          → test formatting
  lib/helpers.ts             → test utility functions

Run: npm run test:unit
Target: 85%+ coverage
```

### **2. Component Tests (30% of suite)**

```
React Components → User Interactions → Props/State/Effects

Examples:
  render(<Button>Click</Button>)
  userEvent.click(button)
  expect(mockFn).toHaveBeenCalled()

Files:
  components/layout/Navbar.tsx            → test navigation
  components/forms/ContactForm.tsx        → test form submission
  components/sections/Hero.tsx            → test rendering
  components/ui/Card.tsx                  → test props/display

Run: npm run test:component
Target: 75%+ coverage
```

### **3. Hook Tests (Custom Hooks)**

```
React Hooks → State Management → Effects

Examples:
  renderHook(() => useContactForm())
  act(() => result.current.setField('value'))
  expect(result.current.values.field).toBe('value')

Files:
  hooks/useContactForm.ts                 → test form state
  hooks/useInvestmentForm.ts              → test investment logic
  hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts             → test animations

Run: npm test -- hooks/
Target: 85%+ coverage
```

### **4. Integration Tests (15% of suite)**

```
Multi-Component Workflows → API Integration → Full Features

Examples:
  render(<ContactPage />)
  fill form + submit
  expect(success message + API call)

Files:
  __tests__/integration/ContactFormFeature.test.tsx
  __tests__/integration/InvestmentFlow.test.tsx
  __tests__/integration/HomePageFlow.test.tsx

Run: npm run test:integration
Target: 15% of total tests
```

### **5. Page Tests (70%+ coverage)**

```
Full Page Rendering → Metadata → Routing

Examples:
  render(await HomePage())
  expect(metadata).toContain('title')
  expect(components).toBeInTheDocument()

Files:
  app/(marketing)/home/__tests__/page.test.tsx
  app/(marketing)/services/gems/__tests__/page.test.tsx
  app/(marketing)/about/__tests__/page.test.tsx

Run: npm test -- page.test.tsx
Target: 70%+ coverage
```

---

## 🛠️ Technology Stack

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│           Test Runner & Framework           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Jest 29.x                                  │
│  - Config: jest.config.js                  │
│  - Setup: jest.setup.js                    │
│  - Language: TypeScript via ts-jest        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│      Component Testing Library              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  React Testing Library                      │
│  - render()                                 │
│  - screen queries (getByRole, getByText)   │
│  - userEvent for interactions              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│         Hook Testing Library                │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  @testing-library/react-hooks               │
│  - renderHook()                             │
│  - act() for state updates                 │
│  - Async hook testing                      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│      Mocking & API Interception             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Mock Service Worker (MSW)                  │
│  - 6 pre-configured endpoints               │
│  - Request interception                    │
│  - Response mocking                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│      Accessibility Testing (Optional)       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  jest-axe                                   │
│  - WCAG compliance checking                 │
│  - Accessibility violations detection      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 📊 Coverage Targets

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│            Coverage Thresholds                   │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Statements:   80%+ (overall)   90%+ (critical) │
│  Branches:     75%+ (overall)   85%+ (critical) │
│  Functions:    80%+ (overall)   90%+ (critical) │
│  Lines:        80%+ (overall)   90%+ (critical) │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

By File Type:
  ├─ Utilities (lib/)           85%+
  ├─ Hooks (hooks/)             85%+
  ├─ Forms (components/forms/)  90%+ [CRITICAL]
  ├─ Components (components/)   75%+
  ├─ Pages (app/)               70%+
  └─ Integration                15% of suite
```

---

## 🚀 Test Execution Pipeline

```
Local Development          CI/CD Pipeline          Coverage Report
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

npm test              →    GitHub Actions    →    lcov-report/
  ↓                        (on push/PR)           index.html
  ├─ Jest runs      →    ├─ Setup (5s)     →    ├─ Coverage %
  ├─ Tests execute   →    ├─ Run tests     →    ├─ Covered lines
  ├─ Coverage calc   →    ├─ Generate      →    ├─ Uncovered
  └─ Report gen      →    │   coverage     →    └─ Trends
                          └─ Upload report
```

---

## 📝 Test File Template Locations

Each category has a template you can copy:

```
Unit Test Template:
  Copy: __tests__/unit/utilities.test.ts
  Paste to: lib/__tests__/[function].test.ts

Component Test Template:
  Copy: __tests__/components/ContactForm.test.tsx
  Paste to: components/__tests__/[Component].test.tsx

Hook Test Template:
  Copy: __tests__/hooks/useContactForm.test.ts
  Paste to: hooks/__tests__/[use...].test.ts

Integration Test Template:
  Copy: __tests__/integration/ContactFormFeature.test.tsx
  Paste to: __tests__/integration/[Feature].test.tsx
```

## ✅ Pre-Test Checklist

```
□ Dependencies installed
  npm install --save-dev jest @testing-library/react ...

□ Config files exist
  jest.config.js
  jest.setup.js
  .github/workflows/test.yml

□ package.json scripts added
  "test": "jest --watch"
  "test:coverage": "jest --coverage"

□ Test infrastructure in place
  __tests__/setup/test-utils.tsx
  __tests__/setup/mswServer.ts
  __tests__/setup/fixtures.ts

□ First test run
  npm test
  Should pass 3 example tests
```

---

## 🎯 Implementation Timeline

```
Week 1: Foundation
  Day 1: Install & verify examples pass
  Day 2: Create 3 unit tests
  Day 3: Create 2 form component tests

Week 2: Expansion
  Day 4: Create 2 layout component tests
  Day 5: Create 2 section component tests
  Day 6: Create integration tests

Week 3: Polish
  Day 7: Coverage analysis & gaps
  Day 8: Final touches
  Day 9: Documentation updates
  Day 10: Team training
```

---

## 🆘 Quick Problem Solver

| Issue                | Solution                                 |
| -------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| Tests not found      | Check file naming: `*.test.ts(x)`        |
| "Cannot find module" | Check moduleNameMapper in jest.config.js |
| Act() warning        | Wrap state updates: `act(() => { ... })` |
| Timeout              | Increase: `jest.setTimeout(10000)`       |
| API errors in test   | Verify MSW handlers are set up           |
| Snapshot issues      | Run: `npm test -- -u`                    |

---
